category_sources: Official mandoc texi2mdoc page says it is a converter from Texinfo into mdoc.
source_facts.description says texi2mdoc converts Texinfo data to mdoc input.
display_name_sources: Official mandoc page title is texi2mdoc.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official mandoc texi2mdoc page and includes overview, release notes, source links, and manual links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official mandoc texi2mdoc page, which says texi2mdoc is available over anoncvs and browseable via CVSweb.
tags_sources: Official mandoc texi2mdoc page describes the utility as a standalone ISO C converter from Texinfo into mdoc.
